heading: Establishment of preclearance operations
label: 4432 Establishment of preclearance operations

amendments: References in Text, referred to in text, was redesignated by , , .Section 44901(d)(4)(B) of title 49section 44901(d)(2)(B) of title 49Pub. L. 115–254, div. K, title I, § 1991(d)(1)(C)(iii)132 Stat. 3628Oct. 5, 2018

children.text: to prevent terrorists, instruments of terrorism, and other security threats from entering the United States;
to prevent inadmissible persons from entering the United States;
to ensure that merchandise destined for the United States complies with applicable laws;
to ensure the prompt processing of persons eligible to travel to the United States; and
to accomplish such other objectives as the Secretary determines are necessary to protect the United States.
